summary: Full e2e testing of iter136 features: Dynamic Roles UI/API, WebsiteTab refactor (Org Info, Auth & Pages, Forms, System Config), Google Drive & OneDrive COMING SOON integrations, Platform Admin tenant address editing, and Forced Password Change modal. All 26 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.

issues: data-testid='ws-tile-enquiry' not present on Enquiry Form tile card - cannot use testid-based selection; found via text content instead

action_items: Consider adding data-testid='ws-tile-enquiry' to the Enquiry Form tile in WebsiteFormsSection.tsx for better testability
critical_code_review_comments: All tested APIs return correct status codes and data structures
WebsiteTab.tsx refactoring into child components (OrgInfoSection, AuthPagesSection, FormsSection, SysConfigSection) is clean and working
RolesTab.tsx correctly handles preset (read-only) vs custom (editable/deletable) roles
Forced password change modal correctly blocks navigation until password is updated

test_credentials.forced_password_change_user: testuser@bright-accounting.local / ChangeMe123! (tenant: bright-accounting) - created by test, has must_change_password=True

seed_data_creation: Created testuser@bright-accounting.local in bright-accounting tenant with must_change_password=True and is_verified=True for forced password change testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter136 features fully verified. Backend /api/admin/roles CRUD works (26 backend tests all pass). Dynamic Roles UI: 6 preset roles visible as BUILT-IN with View-only dialog, custom roles can be created/edited/deleted. WebsiteTab refactored into 5 child components - each section (Org Info, Auth & Pages, Forms, System Config) loads via admin sidebar tabs with forcedSection prop. Google Drive and OneDrive tiles show COMING SOON badge in Cloud Storage category. Platform Admin can edit partner organization addresses. Forced password change modal renders 'Set a new password' dialog on login when must_change_password=True. Previous test reports: iterations 7, 8, and 135 all passed 100%.

feature_verification_details.roles_api_get: PASS - Returns 6 preset roles (Super Admin, Manager, Support Agent, Viewer, Accountant, Content Editor) + custom roles from DB
feature_verification_details.roles_api_post: PASS - Creates custom role with name, description, access_level, modules[]
feature_verification_details.roles_api_put: PASS - Updates custom role fields, persists to DB
feature_verification_details.roles_api_delete: PASS - Deletes custom role, returns 200 with message, role disappears from GET
feature_verification_details.roles_ui_tab: PASS - Roles tab visible in PEOPLE section of admin sidebar
feature_verification_details.roles_ui_create: PASS - Create dialog opens, fills name/description/access/modules, saves successfully, new card appears in grid
feature_verification_details.roles_ui_view_preset: PASS - View button on preset roles opens read-only dialog (name field disabled, no save button)
feature_verification_details.roles_ui_delete: PASS - Delete button shows confirmation dialog, confirming removes role card (8→7 cards)
feature_verification_details.website_org_info: PASS - Store Name, Logo upload, Brand Colors (10 color fields) visible
feature_verification_details.website_auth_pages: PASS - Tile grid with Login Page, Sign Up Page, Verify Email, Customer Portal, Profile Page, Admin Panel, 404, Documents, Store Hero Banner, Articles Hero Banner, Checkout Page Builder, Checkout Success, Checkout Messages, Footer Text, About Us, Navigation, Contact Info
feature_verification_details.website_signup_slide: PASS - Sign Up tile opens slide-over with Bullet 1/2/3 + CTA/closing statement + Registration Form Fields
feature_verification_details.website_forms: PASS - Enquiry Form tile with 6 fields visible, cross-link to Auth & Pages → Sign Up
feature_verification_details.integrations_cloud_storage: PASS - Google Drive + OneDrive both show COMING SOON badge, no Connect button
feature_verification_details.tenant_address_edit: PASS - 6 Address buttons visible, Edit dialog shows line1/line2/city/postal/country/state fields + Save Address button
feature_verification_details.forced_password_change: PASS - testuser@bright-accounting.local logs in, 'Set a new password' modal appears with NEW PASSWORD + CONFIRM PASSWORD fields + 'Update Password & Continue' button
